basics.name: Nidhi Chauhan
basics.title: Salesforce Developer / Administrator
basics.summary:
I design systems that make complex processes simple.

Experienced with building scalable Salesforce solutions across enterprise, government, and non-profit environments. My work sits at the intersection of developing automation, data integrity, and business workflow optimisation.

My career goal is simple:
Build intelligent, scalable systems that empower organisations to move faster and make better decisions.

Always learning. Always improving.

bullets: Acted as primary liaison between business stakeholders and technical teams to align Salesforce enhancements with compliance and regulatory needs.
Designed and deployed 10+ Lightning Web Components (LWC) and Apex triggers to automate business logic, enforce data validation, and streamline internal workflows across the Salesforce platform.

Configure and manage declarative Salesforce architecture, including custom objects, fields, record types, Lightning page layouts, validation rules, and approval processes aligned with evolving operational requirements.
Managed and optimised a 50,000+ recipient email automation system using Salesforce Flow and built an email bounce management system using Apex class and trigger.
Generated certificate PDFs using APTK weaver and Visualforce pages, streamlining document automation using Apex class, and delivery using Flows and LWC.
Integrated Salesforce with third-party platforms, ensuring real-time data sync and zero data loss across systems.
Ensured code quality by adhering to Apex best practices, comprehensive test class coverage, and multi-scenario (positive/negative) testing.
Built reports and dashboards to provide stakeholders with actionable insights and support data-driven decision-making.
Created custom APIs in Apex (using HTTP request/response and secure endpoints) to integrate Salesforce with external platforms, enabling real-time data synchronisation with zero data loss.
Implemented duplicate management, validation rules, and data cleansing strategies, improving data quality KPIs by 30%.
Administered roles, profiles, and permission sets, ensuring secure and compliant data access.
Delivered knowledge transfer sessions, design walkthroughs, and technical documentation for internal IT staff, ensuring sustainability and continuity.
Partner with cross-functional stakeholders to gather requirements, define user stories, and deliver Agile sprint enhancements supporting regulatory and operational needs.
Engineered an end-to-end table extraction automation system leveraging Azure OpenAI API, reducing manual PDF data processing time and improving data accessibility for non-technical stakeholders.

Built and deployed an intuitive Streamlit web interface that enables users to extract structured data from PDFs seamlessly, eliminating the need for technical expertise to interact with AI-powered pipelines.
Integrated Azure OpenAI API with a custom Python backend to power intelligent document parsing, ensuring accurate table recognition and structured data output at scale.

Creating Power BI visualizations, Dashboards, and KPI scorecards, meeting department requirements, and providing solution-oriented data modification with reporting large datasets for agriculture and healthcare.
Enhanced 50+ Power BI reports and dashboards to achieve WCAG 2.0 level AA conformance, significantly improving data accessibility across the department by 70%.
Authored comprehensive WCAG guidelines for Power BI to standardize accessibility practices within the department.
Developing complex calculated measures and custom metrics using Data Analysis Expression Language (DAX) for in-depth data analysis.

Engineered 2 production-grade automation solutions using Python and Shell scripting on AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3, CloudFormation, SSM), eliminating manual toil and significantly accelerating engineering workflows across the development team.

Spearheaded modernisation of 4 legacy cybersecurity products by migrating infrastructure from AWS OpsWorks to AWS Systems Manager, implementing reusable Chef Recipes and Cookbooks to standardise and future-proof the tech stack.

Reduced ticket resolution time by 60% by architecting an AWS-native automation system for Java Flight Recorder (JFR) logging, dramatically improving developer productivity and incident response times.

Established a robust CI/CD pipeline using Jenkins and AWS CloudFormation, automating end-to-end deployment orchestration to ensure reliable, repeatable, and scalable release workflows for automation solutions.
Collaborated cross-functionally with cybersecurity and DevOps engineers to identify operational bottlenecks, translating business needs into scalable cloud infrastructure solutions on AWS.

Optimised cloud infrastructure cost and reliability by leveraging AWS CloudFormation templates for infrastructure-as-code (IaC), enabling consistent environment provisioning and reducing configuration drift across deployments.

Delivered end-to-end Salesforce & Vlocity CPQ solutions for enterprise clients, owning the full lifecycle — requirements analysis, estimation, design, development, testing, and deployment — in a fast-paced Agile environment.

Configured 100+ products in Vlocity's Enterprise Product Catalog (EPC), leveraging Picklists, Product Attributes, Attribute Categories, Product Bundling, Pricing, and Product Lifecycle management to streamline complex telecom product offerings.

Mapped 100+ technical products to 50+ commercial products by identifying critical business requirements and implementing CPQ features, ensuring seamless alignment between front-end quoting and back-end systems.

Built dynamic guided user experiences using OmniScripts, DataRaptors, Vlocity Cards, and Integration Procedures, integrated with REST/SOAP APIs to automate customer onboarding, quoting, and order management workflows.

Engineered custom Salesforce objects and data models using Picklists, Lookup relationships, Junction Objects, Master-Detail relationships, and Formula Fields to meet complex enterprise business logic requirements.

Administered Salesforce platform end-to-end — managing users, roles, profiles, permission sets, approval processes, validation rules, and security settings to maintain governance and compliance across the org.
Designed and maintained real-time Reports and Dashboards to deliver actionable business insights to stakeholders, enabling data-driven decision-making across sales and operations teams.
Executed data loading, migration, and integration tasks using Data Import Wizard, Salesforce Workbench, and IDX Workbench, ensuring data integrity and accuracy across system migrations.

Supported Agile delivery and documentation by contributing to sprint planning, story estimations, root cause analysis, defect resolution, and producing build books and deployment guides for production releases.
Achieved Salesforce Certification via structured Trailhead training, gaining validated proficiency in platform configuration, automation, security, and CRM/ Sales Cloud fundamentals.
Built a hands-on Sales Cloud CRM project, applying core concepts including Lead & Opportunity management, custom objects, validation rules, and dashboards to simulate real-world enterprise workflows.

Developed SQL and data management skills to support querying, reporting, and data integrity tasks — laying the technical foundation for a direct transition into enterprise Salesforce delivery as an analyst.
